Home / Lore / Locations / Camp White Oak

location

Camp White Oak

A remote woodland estate used as a strategic Black Tusk position and extraction site for President Ellis.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Extraction site

Camp White Oak combines a concealed woodland position with a failed Division pursuit: Black Tusk removes Ellis before Agents can capture him. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Ubisoft describes Camp White Oak as an estate in the woodlands near a strategic Black Tusk position. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Black Tusk extracts President Ellis from Camp White Oak before Division Agents can reach him. [2]

Sources

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: Manning National Zoo & Camp White Oak — Ubisoft (2019-07-23). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Later seasonal uses of this location must be versioned separately.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
